message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam class {
  BackgroundColor #F2F2F2
  BorderColor #000000
  ArrowColor #000000
  FontStyle italic
}
skinparam stereotypeCBackgroundColor #B7A9E6
skinparam stereotypeCBorderColor #000000
skinparam stereotypeCFontColor #000000

interface "Iterable" as Iterable
interface "Collection" as Collection
interface "Set" as Set
interface "List" as List
interface "Queue" as Queue

Collection -|> Iterable
Set -|> Collection
List -|> Collection
Queue -|> Collection

@enduml
